certificate.issued_by: Guardian Agent — Agentic Zero Pioneer Team

gaps: No AI-specific risk assessment, impact assessment or risk treatment process defined
Missing AI system performance evaluation, monitoring of model behavior, and continual improvement mechanisms
Insufficient human oversight, accountability assignment, and transparency requirements for AI decisions
No evidence of AI policy, objectives, or management system documentation and internal audit processes
recommendations: Implement formal AI risk management and impact assessment procedures per ISO/IEC 42001 clauses 6.1 and 8.2
Add AI-specific metrics, logging of decisions, and periodic performance reviews with root-cause analysis
Define clear human oversight roles, escalation ownership, and explainability requirements for production decisions
Establish AI policy, documented information controls, and internal audit program covering the AI agent

issues: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
Data minimization: ensure only necessary data is processed
Retention policy: define how long data is retained

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: high. Quality: 100%
